response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed the video to identify visual cues (Minecraft, VTubers) and audio events (singing vs. talking).
2. Identified the singing as a celebratory 'Happy Birthday' song in Japanese, characterized by the phrase 'おめでとう' (Congratulations).
3. Mapped the scenes based on the alternation between singing and talking.
4. Set 'Happy Birthday (Japanese Version)' as the song title for singing segments, with the lyrics being the repetitive 'おめでとう'.
5. Formatted the output according to the requested JSON schema.
response.global_summary: A group of Hololive VTubers celebrates a birthday in Minecraft by singing a Japanese version of the 'Happy Birthday' song and talking.

scenes.description: The VTubers gather in the Minecraft world to set up for a birthday celebration. No vocal music is playing.
The group sings a Japanese version of 'Happy Birthday' to celebrate.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: おめでとう！ おめでとう！ おめでとう！ おめでとう！ ...

scenes.description: The group talks and interacts after the first song segment.
The group sings a Japanese version of 'Happy Birthday' again.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: おめでとう！ おめでとう！ ...

scenes.description: The group talks and interacts again.
The group sings a Japanese version of 'Happy Birthday' one more time.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: おめでとう！ おめでとう！ ...

scenes.description: The group finishes the singing, talks, and continues their Minecraft gameplay.
